ground_truth.title: Our Donated Dental Services Across The States
ground_truth.main_content: Dental Lifeline Network provides comprehensive dental care to vulnerable adults across the United States. These patients receive this care through the generosity of a network of volunteer dentists and laboratories. Get to know more about us! For information on how to apply or to find out if you qualify for donated dental care, click on your state on the map or list below. YOU MAY VISIT THE FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS SECTION FOR FURTHER INFORMATION. Help Restore Smiles Through Volunteering: Make a difference by volunteering your dental expertise to help patients in need. Whether you're a general dentist, specialist or lab, your skills can change lives through our Donated Dental Services (DDS) program. Volunteer Today. Support Dental Lifeline Network: Honor loved ones, become a corporate sponsor, or give monthly to make a lasting impact. You can even celebrate special occasions by hosting an online campaign to help patients in need. Give.
